settings.heading: Email delivery that doesn't suck and won't vanish into the spam abyss
settings.subheading: Stop wondering if your transactional and marketing emails made it. Send at scale, hit inboxes, and skip the mystery.

settings.heading: Built by developers who were sick of broken email APIs
settings.description: We got tired of wrestling with clunky tools, so we built the email platform we always wanted — fast, clean, and actually works without swearing at your terminal.

settings.title: Test Mode (aka Safe Chaos)
settings.description: Blow things up without consequences. Simulate everything, send nothing. Perfect for testing, debugging, and not losing your job.

settings.title: Webhooks That Actually Work
settings.description: We ping your server the second something happens — delivery, open, click, bounce. You'll know.

settings.title: Live Logs (Bring Popcorn)
settings.description: Every request, every response, every oops — logged in real time. Less painful than tailing your server logs.

settings.title: Retry Logic That Babysits
settings.description: Flaky internet? Broken SMTP? We've got auto-retries so you don't have to watch your queue like a hawk.

settings.title: Open & Click Tracking
settings.description: Want to know who opened what and clicked where? Welcome to legally acceptable email surveillance.

settings.title: Markup Freedom
settings.description: Markdown, MJML, raw HTML — whatever you write, we'll render it without crying over inline styles.

settings.title: Inbox Previews
settings.description: Preview your masterpiece before it hits the inbox. Yes, even in Outlook. Especially in Outlook.

settings.title: Custom Domains
settings.description: Send from your own domain and stop looking like a scammer.

settings.heading: Email, But Actually Good
settings.description: No setup rituals. No DNS sorcery. Just emails that send, land, and look damn good doing it. — Available now. Because why wait?

settings.quote: Sendstack's approach to email infrastructure is what convinced us to switch. The deliverability rates alone made it worth it — but the developer experience sealed the deal.

settings.heading: Frequently asked questions
settings.description: Answers to commonly asked questions about our platform

settings.question: How do you make sure emails actually land?
settings.answer: We don't believe in sending emails into the void. With clean IPs, smart routing, and obsessive deliverability practices, your emails show up where they're supposed to — not in spam purgatory.

settings.question: Can I schedule emails to go out later?
settings.answer: Absolutely. Queue them up for next week, next month, or when Mercury's in retrograde. We'll send them when you say so — no manual midnight sends required.

settings.question: Do you support multiple environments?
settings.answer: Yep. You can keep your test sends from leaking into the wild, and your production emails from hitting staging by mistake.

settings.question: Is there a limit to how many emails I can send?
settings.answer: Only if you're on a free plan. Otherwise, we scale with you — up to millions of emails a month.

settings.question: Can I export my data if I decide to leave?
settings.answer: Yes — and we won't guilt-trip you about it. Export everything with a click. Your data's not trapped in a walled garden.

settings.heading: Stay in the loop
settings.description: Get product updates, engineering insights, and the occasional meme. No spam, ever.
